column10: 1,303 tests pass; hunting logic bugs in broader codebase
Fixed: search-api only calls batchSize seeds per turn (was all uncompleted)
Fixed: guard checks completed+blocked>=totalItems before erroring
Fixed: 4 locations changed from || to !=null ternary
Fixed: hitRateLimit skips seed completion in both seed-scrape and keyword-search
Fixed: added cfg.type guard to exclude progress files
Fixed: per-round indicators (R1…/R1✓) instead of misleading global counts
